final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: social-media-cover
Asset type: Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) cover, 2:3 vertical format
Primary request: editorial magazine-style cover announcing GPT-image-2 launch on Lovart platform
Scene/backdrop: minimalist premium studio backdrop with subtle gradient or abstract geometric shapes
Subject: bold typography as hero element with "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart" as focal text
Style/medium: high-end editorial magazine design, clean modern aesthetic, premium brand campaign
Composition/framing: diagonal composition, text and visual elements arranged along diagonal axis, dynamic asymmetrical balance
Lighting/mood: high contrast lighting, dramatic shadows, sophisticated and exclusive mood
Color palette: high contrast accent colors, deep blacks or navy with vibrant accent (electric blue or coral), premium monochrome base with bold color pop
Text (verbatim): "GPT-image-2" "Lovart"
Constraints: must use diagonal layout, must include both text elements prominently, maintain magazine editorial quality
Avoid: cluttered layout, centered symmetrical composition, flat lighting, generic stock aesthetic, watermark
